title: oncidium leeanum
intro: Oncidium leeanum, also known as the "Lee's Oncidium," is a species of orchid that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oncidium leeanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Oncidium leeanum typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots or leaves to create teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
